tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
 Hmm, yeah, yeah[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]                        [ch]E[/ch]
 Got me wide, wide open, got a .45 on him[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
 And he pushing 'bout a 102[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
 Always smokin' somethin', he ain't worried 'bout nothin'[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]                   [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause he ain't got nothing to lose[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]E[/ch]
 I got a thing for the hard liquor on ice[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
 Short days and long nights[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]
 Marlboros out the window[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]
 Middle finger to the sky[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
 Say you wanna get dangerous[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]E[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]
 Now you're speaking my language[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]
 I forgot what your name is[/tab]
[tab] [ch]C[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
 So, I'ma call you mine, I'ma call you mine[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]E[/ch]
 Got me wide, wide open, got a .45 on him[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]C[/ch]
 And he pushing 'bout a 102[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                           [ch]E[/ch]
 Always smokin' somethin', he ain't worried 'bout nothin'[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause he ain't got nothing to lose[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]E[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones (Wild, wild, wild)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones, it's like he knew[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]Am[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones (Wild, wild, wild)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones, they like me too[/tab]

[Verse]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]
 (Yeah) I'm attracted to things that are really crazy[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]E[/ch]
 Asking me how I've been feeling lately[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]F[/ch]
 Coming for mine, then it's Do or die[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]C[/ch]
 I won't let it slide, no stealing bases[/tab]

[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]
 No back and forth bargaining (Now)[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]E[/ch]
 No bitchin' and arguing[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
 A whole lotta problems, living in Gotham[/tab]
[tab]                  [ch]C[/ch]
 And Bunnie's my Harley Quinn (My Harley Quinn)[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]                               [ch]E[/ch]
 Was raised in the darkness, forgive me, I'm guarded (Guarded)[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]                  [ch]Am[/ch]
 I have no shame, I'm in love with the heartless[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]E[/ch]                         [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
 The police will never take us alive and cowgirls don't cry[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]         [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
 Got me wide, wide open, got a .45 on him[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
 And he pushing 'bout a 102[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Am[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
 Always smokin' somethin', he ain't worried 'bout nothin'[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]                     [ch]C[/ch]
 'Cause he ain't got nothing to lose[/tab]

[Post-Chorus]
[tab]                          [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]E[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones (Wild, wild, wild)[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]F[/ch]                       [ch]C[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones, it's like he knew[/tab]
[tab]                         [ch]Am[/ch]                      [ch]E[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones (Wild, wild, wild)[/tab]
[tab]                        [ch]F[/ch]                         [ch]C[/ch]
 I got a thing for the wild ones, they like me too[/tab]

[Outro]

 Yeah (Wild, wild, wild)
 A thing for the wild ones (It's like he knew)
 I got a thing for the wild ones (Wild, wild, wild)
 Got a thing for the wild ones (They like me too, mm)
